name: @ggui-samples/ggui-mapbox-missing-env-demo
description: Negative-path fixture for the public env channel. Mirrors @ggui-samples/ggui-mapbox-demo (registers the Mapbox wrapper) but DELIBERATELY omits `ggui.json#app.publicEnv` — operator forgot to stamp the required key. Exercises the render gate's `gadget_public_env_missing` rejection path.
